title: Specify Permissions

posts.author: Sebastian (Apel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I have a workspace and would like to make the boards within it accessible only to certain people. I have done this with private boards that I have specifically shared.
Now I would like to go one step further and only share certain views (lists) within the private boards. Is this possible and how do I set this up?

Thank you very much for your help

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Workspace permissions are an Enterprise plan feature.

Support

Workspace permissions

3 min read Feature   Workspace permissions allow workspace owners to control what actions can be performed by which team members within the workspace. Workspace owners can set up permissions based...

posts.author: Sebastian (Apel)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! Then I’ll think about a workaround.
